name: Amount
description: Transaction amount in US dollars. Sent by the Super Banking BFF on every transaction authorization request.

name: TransactionType
description: One of: transfer, withdrawal, deposit. Sent by the Super Banking BFF on every transaction authorization request.

name: UserId
description: PingOne user ID — the sub claim from the user's access token. Sent on both transaction and MCP authorization requests.

name: Acr
description: Authentication context class reference — the step-up level already met by the user (e.g. Multi_Factor). Sent on both transaction and MCP authorization requests.

name: Timestamp
description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the transaction request. Sent by the Super Banking BFF on every transaction authorization request.

name: ipAddress
description: Client IP address of the transaction request. Sent by the Super Banking BFF on every authorization request.

name: DecisionContext
description: Identifies the type of MCP authorization check. Always 'McpFirstTool' for MCP first-tool gate requests from the Super Banking BFF.

name: ToolName
description: Name of the MCP tool being invoked (e.g. banking_get_accounts, banking_transfer_funds). Sent by the Super Banking BFF on MCP first-tool gate requests.

name: TokenAudience
description: The aud claim of the presented MCP access token. Must match McpResourceUri to pass delegation validation.

name: ActClientId
description: act.client_id from the MCP access token — identifies the BFF actor in the RFC 8693 delegation chain. Must equal the Client ID of 'Super Banking Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) Admin'.

name: NestedActClientId
description: act.act.client_id or act.act.sub — the upstream agent actor when nested delegation is present (multi-hop RFC 8693 chains).

name: McpResourceUri
description: The expected MCP server resource URI. TokenAudience must match this value for the delegation chain to be valid (e.g. https://mcp-server.pingdemo.com).

name: IsLargeTransaction
description: Amount exceeds $50,000 — unconditional DENY threshold in Super Banking policy.

name: IsTransferOrWithdrawal
description: Transaction type is transfer or withdrawal — these require step-up MFA for high-value amounts.

name: HasMFAAuthentication
description: User has already completed multi-factor authentication — ACR equals Multi_Factor.

name: IsHighValueTransaction
description: Amount exceeds $10,000 — step-up MFA threshold for transfers and withdrawals.

name: RequiresStepUp
description: Transaction requires step-up MFA: amount > $10,000, type is transfer or withdrawal, and user has NOT yet completed MFA.

name: HasValidUserId
description: UserId is present and not the default sentinel value 'none'.

name: HasValidMcpAudience
description: TokenAudience matches McpResourceUri — confirms the token was issued for the correct MCP server.

name: IsMcpFirstToolRequest
description: DecisionContext equals McpFirstTool — identifies this as an MCP first-tool gate request from the Super Banking BFF.

name: HasValidActorChain
description: ActClientId is present and not the default sentinel — confirms the RFC 8693 delegation chain has an actor. After import: update the constant value to the Client ID of 'Super Banking Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) Admin'.

name: Transaction Denied
description: Returned when a transaction is unconditionally denied by policy (amount exceeds $50,000).
payload: Transaction denied: amount ${{12345678-0001-4321-abcd-000000000001}} exceeds the maximum permitted limit of $50,000. TransactionType: {{12345678-0002-4321-abcd-000000000002}}.

name: Transaction Approved
description: Returned when a transaction passes all Super Banking policy checks.

name: Step-Up MFA Required
description: Returned when a high-value transfer or withdrawal requires MFA before proceeding. The BFF checks for code 'step-up-required' and payload.stepUpRequired=true to trigger HTTP 428.
payload: {"stepUpRequired": true, "message": "Transaction of ${{12345678-0001-4321-abcd-000000000001}} ({{12345678-0002-4321-abcd-000000000002}}) requires multi-factor authentication before proceeding.", "amount": "{{12345678-0001-4321-abcd-000000000001}}", "transactionType": "{{12345678-0002-4321-abcd-000000000002}}", "currentAcr": "{{12345678-0004-4321-abcd-000000000004}}", "requiredAcr": "Multi_Factor"}

name: MCP Tool Authorization Denied
description: Returned when the MCP delegation chain fails validation — invalid audience, missing user ID, or invalid actor chain.

name: MCP Tool Authorized
description: Returned when the MCP delegation chain passes all validation checks. The AI agent may proceed with the tool invocation.

name: MCP Denied — Invalid Audience
description: Specific denial statement when TokenAudience does not match McpResourceUri.
payload: {"denied": true, "reason": "invalid-audience", "message": "Token audience '{{12345678-0009-4321-abcd-000000000009}}' does not match expected MCP resource URI '{{12345678-0012-4321-abcd-000000000012}}'. The MCP token was not issued for this server."}

name: MCP Denied — Missing User ID
description: Specific denial statement when UserId is absent from the MCP token chain.
payload: {"denied": true, "reason": "missing-user-id", "message": "No user identity found in the MCP token delegation chain. UserId is required for all Super Banking MCP tool invocations."}

name: MCP Denied — Invalid Actor Chain
description: Specific denial statement when ActClientId is absent or does not match the registered BFF client. Update the BFF_CLIENT_ID constant in the HasValidActorChain condition after import.
payload: {"denied": true, "reason": "invalid-actor-chain", "message": "Actor client ID '{{12345678-0010-4321-abcd-000000000010}}' is not the registered Super Banking BFF. RFC 8693 delegation chain validation failed.", "actClientId": "{{12345678-0010-4321-abcd-000000000010}}"}

name: Deny Large Transactions
description: DENY any transaction where Amount > $50,000. This is an unconditional block regardless of transaction type, ACR level, or user identity.

name: Require Step-Up MFA for High-Value Transfers
description: PERMIT (with step-up obligation) when: Amount > $10,000 AND TransactionType is transfer or withdrawal AND user has NOT completed MFA (Acr != Multi_Factor). The BFF reads the step-up-required statement code and payload.stepUpRequired=true to return HTTP 428.

name: Permit Standard Transactions
description: PERMIT all transactions not caught by the Deny or Step-Up rules. This includes: amounts <= $10,000 of any type; high-value transfers/withdrawals where the user HAS completed MFA; all deposits regardless of amount.

name: MCP Deny — Invalid Token Audience
description: DENY when TokenAudience does not match McpResourceUri. Confirms the MCP token was issued for the correct resource server.

name: MCP Deny — Missing User ID
description: DENY when UserId is absent or equal to the sentinel 'none'. All Super Banking MCP tool calls require an authenticated user identity in the token chain.

name: MCP Deny — Invalid Actor Chain
description: DENY when ActClientId is absent or sentinel 'none'. Validates the RFC 8693 delegation chain has a registered actor. NOTE: After import, update condition HasValidActorChain to also check that ActClientId equals the Client ID of 'Super Banking Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) Admin'.

name: MCP Permit Valid Tool Invocation
description: PERMIT MCP tool invocation when all validation checks pass: TokenAudience matches McpResourceUri, UserId is present, and ActClientId is a registered actor.

name: Super Banking Transaction Authorization
description: Authorizes Super Banking banking transactions. Evaluates Amount, TransactionType, and Acr against policy rules. DenyOverrides: if any rule produces DENY the final decision is DENY. Rules in priority order: (1) DENY if Amount > $50,000; (2) PERMIT+step-up if Amount > $10,000 and type is transfer/withdrawal and no MFA; (3) PERMIT otherwise.

name: Super Banking MCP Delegation Authorization
description: Authorizes MCP tool invocations from the Super Banking AI Agent. Validates the RFC 8693 actor delegation chain: TokenAudience must match McpResourceUri, UserId must be present, ActClientId must be the registered BFF. DenyOverrides: any DENY wins. IMPORTANT: After import, update condition HasValidActorChain to compare ActClientId against the actual Client ID of 'Super Banking Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) Admin'.

name: Super Banking Policies
description: Root policy set for the Super Banking demo. Contains: (1) Super Banking Transaction Authorization — evaluated when evaluateFinancialPolicy=true or TransactionType is present; (2) Super Banking MCP Delegation Authorization — evaluated when DecisionContext=McpFirstTool. DenyOverrides with evaluateAll=true ensures both policies are always evaluated and any DENY wins.
